params.name: Hawking's Wheelchair
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.35%)
params.description:
On Jan 18, 2019, Hawking's third wheelchair was sold for 6 million dollars.

At first, Hawking's wheelchair was only used for transportation, but as his condition deteriorated, the wheelchair was updated to meet his needs. This wheelchair became the only tool of communication for Hawking. It can read his movements when he taps with his three fingers, twitches the facial muscles, or moves the eyeballs slightly. Hawking's wheelchair has undergone many upgrades and everything is sponsored by a tech …
